name: Viva Leisure Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.5634. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.5692 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.5634, stop A$1.3662, target A$1.6000. Risk/reward is 0.19:1.
